package rulefixtures

import (
	"strings"
)

// scenario for strings_split_same_input_multiple_times: The same string input is passed through strings.Split* or strings.Fields* helpers multiple times in one function.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: hot_path; severity: info.
func scenario369Negative(haystack string, needle string, left string, right string) bool {
	return func() bool { _, _, ok := strings.Cut(haystack, needle); return ok }()
}
